description: Legal record (#41b). Loan contract. Abū l-Faḍl b. Yūsuf is granted the right to repay his debt of 10 dinars to Abū Isḥāq al-ʿAṭṭār b. ʿAlī in installments of 0.5 dinar each month starting in Sivan 1467 Seleucid. NB: #41a has no connection to #41b; Goitein probably skipped over the latter and returned to it when he had already given the number #42 to the next record.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
